messages.message:
Happy New Year 2026! 

Thank you for being part of our journey in 2025.
Whether we’ve already worked together or just connected, it truly means a lot.

Wishing you and your business a year filled with growth, clarity, and new opportunities.

Here’s to a strong, healthy, and successful 2026! 

Warm wishes,
Johnny
 新年快乐 2026！ 

感谢您参与我们的 2025 年旅程。
无论我们是否已经合作过，还是刚刚建立联系，这都意义重大。

祝愿您和您的企业在新的一年里充满成长、清晰和新的机遇。

祝 2026 年强壮、健康、成功！ 

此致，
约翰尼

Hi 
Hope you’ve been well after the holidays.

We’ve recently launched some new models that might fit different studio setups.
If you’re exploring options this year, I’m happy to share them for reference.
